content: Phase 1: Get integration playbooks (YouTube API v3 + Gemini)
Phase 1: Setup guide for Google Cloud + YouTube OAuth credentials
Phase 1: Build POC scripts (TTS + video generation + upload pipeline)
Phase 1: Test E2E pipeline (generate video + upload)
Phase 2: Backend API (FastAPI - jobs, runs, templates, analytics)
Phase 2: Frontend Dashboard (React - queue, history, templates, settings)
Phase 2: End-to-end testing with Testing Agent
